description: A choropleth map of the contiguous United States titled 'Net immigration fell in every metro area in 2025', with a legend where light yellow means net immigration fell and darker orange means it fell more than 50 percent. Labeled callouts point to several metro areas with percentage declines, including Seattle down 31 percent, Denver down 72 percent, Chicago down 62 percent, the NYC metro down 65 percent, Washington D.C. down 44 percent, L.A. down 67 percent, Dallas down 52 percent, El Paso down 95 percent, and Miami down 32 percent.
notable_text: Net immigration fell in every metro area in 2025; Net immigration fell; Fell more than 50%
